vocab.meaning: có khiếu trồng cây/mát tay chăm sóc cây cối
vocab.example: My grandmother had a real green thumb, and she taught me how to keep our backyard hydrangeas blooming all summer.

vocab.meaning: đơm hoa kết trái/đạt được kết quả tốt sau nỗ lực
vocab.example: It took months of patient watering, but eventually, my little tomato plant began to bear fruit, which was incredibly rewarding.

vocab.meaning: người (hoặc cây) phát triển muộn hơn so với bình thường
vocab.example: I remember my sunflowers were a bit of a late bloomer compared to the neighbors', but when they finally opened, they were magnificent.

vocab.meaning: diệt trừ mầm mống từ sớm/ngăn chặn vấn đề ngay khi mới bắt đầu
vocab.example: I had to nip the pest problem in the bud by using organic soap, otherwise, the aphids would have destroyed my rosebushes.
After a morning spent tending to my seedlings in the garden, I actually felt as fresh as a daisy despite the hard work.

vocab.meaning: người rất nhút nhát, hay xấu hổ
vocab.example: As a child, I was a bit of a shrinking violet, so I preferred spending time alone in the garden growing lilies rather than playing team sports.

vocab.meaning: không phải là một trải nghiệm dễ dàng hay thoải mái
vocab.example: Trying to grow exotic plants in a tropical climate was no bed of roses; I had to deal with constant humidity and insects.

vocab.meaning: mọi việc diễn ra suôn sẻ và thành công rực rỡ
vocab.example: Despite my initial lack of experience, my first vegetable garden ended up coming up roses, and we had a huge harvest.

vocab.meaning: đứng ngồi này trông nọ (nghĩ rằng hoàn cảnh của người khác tốt hơn mình)
vocab.example: I used to look at my friend's exotic orchids and think the grass is always greener, until I realized how much effort they required.

vocab.meaning: gặt hái thành quả/hưởng thành quả từ công sức bỏ ra
vocab.example: I spent the whole spring planting seeds, and by autumn, I was able to reap the rewards with a basket full of organic produce.
